adjective_suffixes.meaning: 表示有…倾向的、具有…性质的

negative_prefixes.rule: 最常用，用于大多数形容词、分词和部分动词，表示否定
用于拉丁词源，以 -ate, -ent, -ible, -ite 等结尾的词，表示否定
in- 的变体，用于以 m-, p-, b- 开头的词
in- 的变体，用于以 l- 开头的词
in- 的变体，用于以 r- 开头的词
用于动词、名词、形容词，表示“相反”或“去除”，常带负面含义
表示“非”、“无”，较中性，用于形容词、名词
表示“错误地”或“坏地”，常用于动词
表示“反对、抵抗、相反”，用于名词、形容词
表示“去除、向下、离开”，常用于动词
表示“无、不、没有”，多用于学术词汇

examples: disaster 灾难（原指星位不正）

synonyms.example: It is significant that education plays a key role in personal development.
Education is crucial for economic growth.
It is vital to address climate change urgently.
Good communication skills are essential in the workplace.
Safety is of paramount importance in the construction industry.
The Internet has become an indispensable part of daily life.
Many people believe that technology improves productivity.
Some argue that homework is unnecessary.
Critics maintain that the policy is unfair.
The author contends that economic growth is sustainable.
Scientists assert that the findings are conclusive.
I hold the view that education should be free.
Pollution leads to health problems.
Deforestation results in loss of biodiversity.
Social media gives rise to new forms of communication.
Globalization has brought about cultural exchanges.
Lack of exercise contributes to obesity.
We must address the issue of poverty.
The government is tackling unemployment.
Diplomacy can resolve conflicts peacefully.
Cities must cope with increasing populations.
The article deals with environmental issues.
Numerous studies support this theory.
A multitude of factors influence consumer behavior.
A host of problems arise from urbanization.
There is a plethora of information on the Internet.
There is considerable evidence for climate change.
Exercise is beneficial to health.
Free trade is advantageous for economies.
The policy has favorable outcomes.
Technology has positive effects on education.
A desirable solution benefits all parties.
Smoking is detrimental to health.
Adverse weather conditions delayed the flight.
Pesticides can be harmful to the environment.
Media can have a negative impact on children.
Pollution has undesirable consequences.
The cost of living has risen sharply.
House prices soared in the last decade.
Demand for electric cars has surged.
The conflict escalated into a war.
Fast food outlets have proliferated in cities.
The population of rural areas has declined.
Natural resources are diminishing.
Support for the policy has dwindled.
Temperatures plummeted to record lows.
The economy is expected to shrink this year.
The data demonstrates a clear trend.
The graph illustrates the change in sales.
The survey indicates that people prefer online shopping.
Research reveals a link between diet and health.
The results suggest that the method is effective.

words.example: Some people advocate a reduction in working hours.
The author contends that technology has improved our lives.
Scientists assert that global warming is a pressing issue.
Many maintain that education should be free.
The professor postulated that the theory could be applied.
Furthermore, public transportation reduces traffic congestion.
Moreover, online learning offers flexibility.
Consequently, many students struggle with debt.
Nonetheless, there are some drawbacks to consider.
Some believe in tradition, whereas others embrace change.
The number of tourists fluctuated between 2010 and 2015.
After a sharp rise, prices stabilized at $50.
The population growth plateaued in the 2000s.
Sales peaked at 10,000 units in December.
The unemployment rate declined from 5% to 3%.
The price increased significantly over the year.
The cost is considerably higher in urban areas.
Emissions were substantially reduced after the policy.
The score only marginally improved this year.
The plan was moderately successful in achieving its goals.
Undoubtedly, technology has transformed society.
Rapid urbanization inevitably leads to housing shortages.
Studies invariably find a correlation between health and income.
The policy failed, presumably because of public opposition.
This is arguably the most effective solution.

words.memory_tip: 一杯咖啡加两块糖：ne-cess-ary（c, ss）

meanings.example: We need to address the problem.
He exercises to maintain his figure.
She gave an account of the accident.
The poor weather accounts for the delay.
She is in charge of the project.
He is critical of the government's policies.
This is a critical stage of the experiment.
A novel approach to solving the problem.
The fine details of the plan.
This rule does not apply to you.
What is the subject of the book?
The schedule is subject to change.
